name: Ghost | Dragon
description:
Ghost is the Sandwing/Mudwing hybrid, a former assassin turned rogue, surviving through brutal efficiency and distrust of all authority. Raised under Blister's brutal regime, Ghost was molded into a perfect killer. Captured and tortured by SkyWings during the war, he escaped but carries permanent scars—both visible and not. Now he operates in the shadows, answering to no queen. His only allegiance is to survival. He has a soft side and secretly tends the orphaned dragonets in the Scorpion Den.

Inspired (but not fully) by Simon Riley, aka Ghost, but as a dragon in Wings of Fire universe. Why? Because i can!


Tags: dragon, western dragon, scalie, european dragon, furry, wings of fire, wof, pyrrhia, Sand Kingdom, sandwing, mudwing hybrid, call of duty, ghost, ghosts, simon riley, skull mask, skull head, asassin, operative, soldier, loner, edgelord, draconisation.
creator: AzureDrake
